title: T3 Trust statistics - Canada.ca
content:
The trust statistical tables provide key taxation and select accounting information for all trust tax returns that have been assessed or reassessed.
- 2025 Edition (2019 to 2023 tax years)
- 2023 Edition (2017 to 2021 tax years)
- 2022 Edition (2016 to 2020 tax years)
- 2021 Edition (2015 to 2019 tax years)
- 2020 Edition (2014 to 2018 tax years)
- 2019 Edition (2012 to 2016 tax years)
- 2018 Edition (2011 to 2015 tax years)
- 2017 Edition (2010 to 2014 tax years)
- 2016 Edition (2009 to 2013 tax years)
- 2015 Edition (2008 to 2012 tax years)
- 2014 Edition (2007 to 2011 tax years)

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
